faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

answer.text: The main difference between geophysics and applied geophysics is the purpose of their research. Geophysics: also known as pure geophysics, this field studies the Earth's physical properties and processes to gain information and develop theories.Applied Geophysics: This field uses the information and methods gained from geophysics to address real-world problems. Geophysics is used in many industries, including oil and gas, mining, environmental consulting, infrastructure development, and space exploration.Some applications of geophysics include: Exploration Geophysics: Geophysical methods are used to search for valuable resources in the Earth's crust, such as oil, gas, coal, and minerals. Site Characterization: Geophysical services collect data to characterize a site, such as for monitoring electric and magnetic fields. Environmental Monitoring: Geophysical data can be used to monitor the environment, such as groundwater, landfills, and plume contamination.Applied geophysics is used in many fields, including:Civil Engineering: Geophysical applications are used in roads, bridges, tunnels, and harbors.Archaeology: Geophysical applications are used to characterize sites.Geological Hazards: Geophysical applications are used to study landslides, erosion, and karst.

lists: Exploration Geophysics: Geophysical methods are used to search for valuable resources in the Earth's crust, such as oil, gas, coal, and minerals.
Site Characterization: Geophysical services collect data to characterize a site, such as for monitoring electric and magnetic fields.
Environmental Monitoring: Geophysical data can be used to monitor the environment, such as groundwater, landfills, and plume contamination.
Civil Engineering: Geophysical applications are used in roads, bridges, tunnels, and harbors.
Archaeology: Geophysical applications are used to characterize sites.
Geological Hazards: Geophysical applications are used to study landslides, erosion, and karst.

reviews.review_heading: A student prospective on Kurukshetra University.
reviews.review_text: Our department gives proper working material in labs. The solutions used in experiments are well-managed. Wi-Fi facilities are also available in all the university areas. In the library, there is really a quiet environment where we can study with all our concentration.

The hostel facility here is also nice and rooms are big and spacious. Hostels are also provided with library, medical, and Wi-Fi facilities. The mess of the hostel is good, and the food served is healthy.

There is a dispensary for medical facilities. Sports complex is there where different game programs are organised from time to time.

They are always ready for help. Also, campus has inbuilt Wi-Fi connection of its own which is open only for students and research scholars. Also department has its own library.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Labs are well-equipped. All chemicals are present in lab. The whole university is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel facility is very good. I am living in Yamuna Bhawan hostel no 13. Food facilities, infrastructure, and all facilities are up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Glimpse of Campus and Hostel.
reviews.review_text: There are various types of facilities which are provided to the students in our department. In our university, facilities provided to the students include Wi-Fi, laboratories, research laboratories, classrooms, library, common room for girls, etc. The facilities provided at our hostel are very good. The quality of food is good, and food is prepared in a hygienic environment. Also, there is a hostel market in the girls' hostel so that we do not need to go outside the hostel to take anything.

admission_process.title: AISECT University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: AISECT University admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The university offers conducts entrance test and/ or group discussion and interview/ direct admission to offer admission to candidates.AISECT University conducts the AJEE exam to shortlist candidates for admission in various programmes offered by the varsity.AISECT Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Management, Commerce, Computer Application, etc. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

AISECT offers admission to candidates either based on their merit or entrance exam score. Candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to get admission. Below are theAISECT University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Download:AISECT Prospectus
AISECT University admission process includes registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: AISECT Application Process 2025

Aspirants can apply online or download the application form. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 400 for each course. Candidates can pay the application fee in cash or DD or via any of the online payment modes.
STEP 2: Selection

Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria for AISECT University, Jharkhand admissions are informed about the date, time and venue of admission procedure (written test and/or group discussion and interview/direct admission) on the official website of the University.

All candidates need to appear forAJEE examto secure admission at AISECT University, Jharkhand. In case direct admission is offered in any course, the same would be carried out basis the merit list prepared as per the application forms received. For all the courses offered by the university, the admission notice will appear in the daily national newspaper/university website/notice board or any other publicity media.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

An e-mail and SMS shall also be sent to all the candidates stating that the admission list has been displayed on the official website as well as a notice board of the University. “All selected candidates will get intimation of their selection through an Admission Letter are sent through courier. Details regarding payment of fee at the time of admission, allotment of hostel and date, time and venue for commencement of the academic session will be mentioned in the Admission Letter”, informs the official website.
